patches.name: Custom Maps API Key
patches.description: Replace Velo'v Google Maps key with your own to fix it

patches.name: Export all activities
patches.description: Makes all activities launchable externally by setting android:exported="true" in the manifest

patches.name: In-app login
patches.description: Login within the app (identities) instead of using the browser (keycloak)

patches.name: No geolocalisation check
patches.description: Allows you to unlock a bike even if you're not near the station.
